title: My Autogrill — Point Transfer Security Limits
goal: Prevent fraudulent activities and align with market best practices by implementing specific thresholds for the peer-to-peer point donation feature.
description: To enhance the security of our loyalty program, we have introduced a new regulation for point transfers between users. Each single donation now requires a minimum of 50 points and is capped at a maximum of 1,000 points. These limits are designed to mitigate the risk of account misuse and ensure a balanced ecosystem, protecting both the customers' point balances and the integrity of the My Autogrill digital world.
